summary: Iteration 2 scoped: SOAT registration and tracking per vehicle, FCM notification infrastructure (6 notification types, notifications table in api-gateway, cursor pagination), ManageAttendeesPage redesign (Story 2.9 deferred from iter-1). 10 user stories (US-2-1 through US-2-10). 13 tasks including 1 mandatory QA task (T-2-12). Design gate is a hard pre-condition. Testing order enforced: 2.8 -> 2.7 -> 2.4/2.5/2.6. Home Dashboard SOAT badge explicitly deferred to iter-3. api-gateway Prisma first-time setup (prisma init) distinguished from 4-service prisma migrate reset.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: docs/handoffs/po.md present with 10 user stories (US-2-1 through US-2-10) and 13 tasks (T-2-1 through T-2-13)

qualityGates.name: qa_task_present
qualityGates.detail: T-2-12 (agent: qa) defined covering dart analyze, flutter test, unit tests (SoatCubit, NotificationsCubit), widget tests (3 new pages)

qualityGates.name: scope_defined
qualityGates.detail: Out-of-scope items documented: Home Dashboard SOAT badge (iter-3), notification tap routing (iter-5), Mapbox migration (iter-3), follow system (iter-4). Design gate is a mandatory pre-condition.

qualityGates.name: testing_order_documented
qualityGates.detail: Testing order enforced: Story 2.8 (backend endpoints) must complete before Story 2.7 (mark as read). Stories 2.4/2.5/2.6 depend on 2.8.

qualityGates.name: iteration_context_consumed
qualityGates.detail: iteration_context.md pre-flight checklist items incorporated: api-gateway prisma init, build_runner pre-flight, stale .g.dart 4 failures, DocumentSlotPill caller contract, design gate frames list.
